title: Formula to combine columns into one
excerpt: Any tips or formulas available to combine data from several columns to one? Using workform integration and due to inability to return to previous question in the form, we have 4 date columns transferring to the board dep…

posts.author: cacorrig (Candice Corrigan)
posts.cookedHtml: Any tips or formulas available to combine data from several columns to one? Using workform integration and due to inability to return to previous question in the form, we have 4 date columns transferring to the board depending on how respondents answer the form. Would like to have one date column that pulls the date from each row that is not blank into one column. No row will have data in more than one date column.

posts.author: ameya.athalye (Ameya A)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cacorrig ,

Did you try this?
CONCATENATE({Date1},{Date2},{Date3},{Date4})

Hope this works

Ameya

posts.author: cacorrig (Candice Corrigan)
posts.cookedHtml: I had to rename each column so there were not duplicate names, but yes! Thank you!
